articles.title: US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried
articles.summary: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.

articles.summary: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".
